summary: Asian shares eased from record highs and oil held gains as efforts to revive a peace deal with Iran showed little progress.

title: Short Seller Andrew Left Found Guilty of Securities Fraud
title_cn: 卖空者安德鲁·莱夫特 (Andrew Left) 被判犯有证券欺诈罪
summary: Andrew Left, one of the world’s most prominent short sellers, was found guilty of securities fraud by a federal jury after a landmark trial that scrutinized his use of social media to move the price of stocks.

title_cn: 中国遏制香港购房热潮破纪录的风险
summary: Chinese who spent more than ever on Hong Kong real estate in the first quarter of this year now face a hurdle to overcome as rules get stricter on wealthy people in the mainland taking cash overseas.

title: Bloom CEO Has No Plans to Sell Shares After AI Investor Run-up
title_cn: AI 投资者崛起后 Bloom 首席执行官没有出售股票的计划
summary: Bloom Energy Corp., a supplier to Oracle Corp. that’s seen its stock price double in the past two months, doesn’t see a need to sell shares to meet surging demand from data centers, its chief executive officer says.

title: Activist Investor Elliott Calls for Review at Northern Star
title_cn: 激进投资者埃利奥特呼吁对北极星进行审查
summary: Elliott Investment Management LP has built a large stake in Australia’s biggest gold miner Northern Star Resources Ltd. and is pushing for a strategic review, including a potential sale.

title: Swiss Dental Startup vVardis Is Preparing for US IPO
title_cn: 瑞士牙科初创公司 vVardis 正在为美国 IPO 做准备
summary: vVardis Holding AG, a Swiss dental startup, is working with banks for a US initial public offering that could come this year, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Holds Fall as Traders Digest Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易员消化美伊谈判的困惑，金价持续下跌
summary: Gold held a decline as conflicting messages from the US and Iran on a diplomatic resolution to the war kept concerns over prolonged trade and geopolitical disruptions alive.

title: China Robotics Firms Line Up IPOs to Pitch Next Phase of AI
title_cn: 中国机器人公司排队上市以推销下一阶段的人工智能
summary: China is pitching itself as the global fulcrum for the next phase of artificial intelligence and a legion of robotics companies is lining up initial public offerings to test investor appetite.

title: Oil Holds Biggest Gain in a Month on Standoff in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 美伊谈判陷入僵局，油价创一个月来最大涨幅
summary: Oil steadied after its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks raised the risk that energy flows from the Persian Gulf could be curtailed for longer.

title: Australian Wheat Crop Expected to Drop 26% on Weather, War Costs
title_cn: 受天气和战争成本影响，澳大利亚小麦产量预计下降 26%
summary: Australia’s winter wheat crop is forecast to fall by more than a quarter in the 2026/27 season due to unusually dry weather, low global prices and higher input costs resulting from the war in the Middle East.

title: CFTC Awards Five Whistleblowers $8 Million for Enforcement Tips
title_cn: CFTC 奖励五位举报人 800 万美元以奖励执法提示
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it will award more than $8 million to five whistleblowers who provided information that helped agency investigators recover funds for defrauded investors.

title: Emerging Currencies Snap Winning Streak as Peace Deal in Doubt
title_cn: 和平协议存疑，新兴货币终结连胜
summary: Emerging-market currencies snapped an eight-day winning streak on Monday as hopes faded for an imminent peace deal, even though President Donald Trump tried to calm market jitters by saying talks with Iran are moving at a “rapid pace.”

title: AI Compute To Become a Wall Street Asset
title_cn: 人工智能计算将成为华尔街资产
summary: Wall Street may be creating the first market for AI compute. Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI futures could become as important as oil futures, how companies will hedge higher GPU costs, and why AI token prices are still rising despite more efficient models. (Correct: Video replaced with proper guest) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Week | Britain’s Debt Problem, Poland’s Economic Boom (Correct)
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 |英国的债务问题，波兰的经济繁荣（正确）
summary: This week, the UK’s debt burden and weak growth are reviving fears that financial markets could once again destabilize British politics and policy. And, investors see data centers as long-term infrastructure, but neighbors worry about noise, water use, power demand and lasting costs. Plus, is Poland is one of the world’s fastest-growing economies, but it faces challenges to keep up its rapid rate of growth. Later, war in the Middle East and US tariffs are simultaneously tightening global aluminum supply and pushing prices sharply higher worldwide. (Corrects chart "The British Political Chaos Discount") (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise on Trump’s Iran Remarks, AI Optimism: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗言论和人工智能乐观情绪推动股市上涨：市场结束
summary: A rebound on Wall Street drove stocks to all-time highs as President Donald Trump said talks with Iran are continuing at a rapid pace, with the market also rising on renewed artificial-intelligence enthusiasm.

title: Return Stacked ETF Outpaces S&P 500
title_cn: 堆叠 ETF 回报率超过标准普尔 500 指数
summary: Corey Hoffstein, CEO and CIO of Newfound Research, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They drill down into the Return Stacked US Stocks and Managed Futures ETF (ticker: RSST). (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The office of Canada-US Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc stressed the importance of “maintaining the highly integrated North American energy market” ahead of talks in Washington with US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer.

summary: The AI dynamos are eyeing the public markets, but some wonder whether SpaceX’s planned June listing will steal their thunder.

Today's guests are JPMorgan Asset Management CIO of US Core Equity Team Hamilton Reiner, Newfound Research CEO and CIO Corey Hoffstein, Simplify Asset Management Head of Multi-Asset Solutions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave-Tied Data Center Seeks $850 Million Junk Bond Sale
title_cn: CoreWeave 关联数据中心寻求 8.5 亿美元垃圾债券出售
summary: A data center tied to CoreWeave Inc. is set to get funding from a $850 million junk-bond sale by Elk Grove Village Property LLC, which joins a wave of high-yield issuers tapping debt markets to fund artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: AI Rally, Haven Flows Boost Bets on Further Dollar Gains
title_cn: 人工智能反弹、避险资金流推动美元进一步上涨的押注
summary: Traders are betting the US dollar will rise in the weeks ahead, supported by lingering uncertainty over US-Iran talks and the AI-fueled rally in the stock market.

title: Colombian Assets Rally After Surprise Win of Pro-Trump Outsider
title_cn: 支持特朗普的局外人意外获胜后哥伦比亚资产上涨
summary: Colombia’s currency leaped by the most in four years while bonds and stocks surged after right-wing outsider Abelardo de La Espriella unexpectedly won the first-round of voting for the presidency and went into the runoff as clear favorite against leftist Ivan Cepeda.

title: U.S. Bancorp Vice Chair, BTIG CEO on Benefits of Combining
title_cn: 美国合众银行副主席、BTIG 首席执行官谈合并的好处
summary: Stephen Philipson, U.S. Bancorp vice chair, and Anton LeRoy, BTIG CEO, discuss the completion of U.S. Bancorp's acquisition of BTIG and the benefits that will come from the combination on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Food Industry Faces Whey Protein Shortages As Americans Want it in Everything
title_cn: 食品行业面临乳清蛋白短缺，因为美国人什么都想要乳清蛋白
summary: Kristina Peterson, Bloomberg reporter covering food, says that consumer demand for additional protein in the US has increased so much that companies are facing supply shortages in whey protein. Manufacturers are racing to source other supply lines or are forced to reformulate recipes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HPE Soars After Full-Year Profit Outlook Tops Estimate | Closing Bell
title_cn: HPE 全年利润前景超出预期后飙升结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Emily Graffeo and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Torrid Rally in Rocket Stocks Falters as SpaceX IPO Nears
title_cn: 随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股临近，火箭股的强劲上涨势头减弱
summary: A seemingly boundless rally in space-related firms is showing further signs of weakness, with several stocks stumbling for a second day on Monday, as the public debut of Elon Musk’s SpaceX looms.

title: Nvidia's Huang on South Korean Partnerships
title_cn: Nvidia 黄仁勋谈韩国合作伙伴关系
summary: Jensen Huang speaks to reporters in Taipei about the high potential of South Korean tech companies. He speaks as Nvidia enters the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel technology in that arena. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PBOC Currency Policy Guessing Game is Traders’ New AI Experiment
title_cn: 中国人民银行货币政策猜测游戏是交易员的新人工智能实验
summary: It’s been a source of intrigue and confusion among currency traders for years. Just how does China decide each day where it’s going to set its fixing rate for the yuan — a reference point that determines its permitted trading range for the next session?

title: Alphabet to Raise $80 Billion in Equity for AI Spending
title_cn: Alphabet 将筹集 800 亿美元股权用于人工智能支出
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is raising $80 billion through a package of equity offerings, including an investment deal with Berkshire Hathaway Inc., as the company races to fund its ambitious artificial intelligence spending plans.

title: Stocks up as Trump Cites Rapid Pace in Iran Talks | The Close 6/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗谈判进展迅速，股市上涨收盘价 2026 年 6 月 1 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are RBC Capital Markets Equity Derivatives Strategist Amy Wu Silverman, Sidley Austin Partner Kai Liekefett, Union Square Advisors President & Co-Founder Ted Smith, Bancorp’s Stephen Philipson & BTIG CEO Anton LeRoy, New York Life Investment Management Global Market Strategist Julia Hermann, Susquehanna International Group Senior Equity Research Analyst Mehdi Hosseini, House of Lords Member Dambisa Moyo, & D-Wave Quantum President & CEO Dr. Alan Baratz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Will Raise $80 Billion to Fund AI Spending
title_cn: Alphabet 将筹集 800 亿美元用于资助人工智能支出
summary: Google parent Alphabet will raise $80 billion in equity capital to pay for ambitious artificial intelligence spending plans. Mandeep Singh of Bloomberg Intelligence has more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HPE Surges After Intense Demand for AI Buoys Sales Forecast
title_cn: 人工智能需求旺盛提振销售预测，慧与股价飙升
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. shares soared in extended trading after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that topped estimates, citing massive growth in AI-fueled demand for its servers and networking.

title: Nvidia’s AI Chips Sought by Chinese Labs With Ties to Military
title_cn: 与军方有联系的中国实验室寻求英伟达的人工智能芯片
summary: At least seven Chinese universities that support the country’s armed forces and defense industry are seeking access to Nvidia Corp.’s H200 chips, the most powerful artificial intelligence processors ever allowed by the US to be sold in China, according to a review of procurement records.

title: Mach Industries Valued at $1.8 Billion in Latest Funding Deal
title_cn: Mach Industries 在最新融资交易中估值达 18 亿美元
summary: Defense startup Mach Industries notched a $1.8 billion valuation in a funding deal to ramp up production of its autonomous aircraft, strike systems and other gear for the Pentagon and allied forces.

title: Vast Space Expands Into Europe With French Astronaut Missions
title_cn: 法国宇航员任务将广阔的太空扩展到欧洲
summary: Vast Space, founded by former crypto tycoon Jed McCaleb, will establish a European headquarters in Paris and send French astronauts on two crewed missions to space, the company announced Monday.

title: Nvidia Is Taking On Intel and AMD With AI Chip for Computers
title_cn: Nvidia 正在通过计算机人工智能芯片挑战英特尔和 AMD
summary: Nvidia Corp. is entering the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel Corp. technology in that arena and modernizing the machines for the AI era.

title: Strategy Sells $2.5 Million of Bitcoin, Breaking Playbook
title_cn: Strategy 出售 250 万美元比特币，打破策略
summary: Weeks after Michael Saylor opened the door to selling Bitcoin, Strategy Inc. disposed of about $2.5 million of the cryptocurrency, a symbolic break from the maximalist playbook that helped make the company one of the market’s largest buyers and the token’s biggest corporate holder.

title: Meredith Whitney on Economy, AI, Credit, Housing Markets
title_cn: 梅雷迪思·惠特尼 (Meredith Whitney) 谈经济、人工智能、信贷、住房市场
summary: Meredith Whitney Advisory Group CEO, Meredith Whitney, discusses the economy, artificial intelligence, credit and housing markets. She speaks with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on “Open Interest.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GoPro Warns of Going-Concern Risk Amid AI-Fueled Memory Crunch
title_cn: GoPro 警告人工智能引发的内存紧缩带来持续经营风险
summary: Surging memory costs are pushing action-camera maker GoPro Inc. to the brink. The company, founded by Nicholas Woodman, warned of risks to its ability to continue as a going concern and is seeking financing to avert a default, according to a latest filing.

title: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over Chatbot Safety Concerns
title_cn: 佛罗里达州因聊天机器人安全问题起诉 OpenAI 和 Sam Altman
summary: The state of Florida sued OpenAI and Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman, accusing the artificial intelligence company of ignoring safety warnings and releasing its ChatGPT product while knowing it was harmful to users.

title: For Goldman’s Top Bankers, It’s All AI Data Centers All the Time
title_cn: 对于高盛的顶级银行家来说，人工智能数据中心一直都是他们的关注点
summary: For leveraged finance practitioners, artificial intelligence is the only game in town — especially in the absence of more debt deals to finance mergers and acquisitions.

title: Moyo: We Could Be in Early Innings of New World Order
title_cn: 莫约：我们可能处于新世界秩序的早期阶段
summary: Economist, Author, and Member of the House of Lords Dambisa Moyo discusses the advancements of technology and how it may lead to the diminution of jobs. She points out that there is still so much uncertainty with how the effects of artificial intelligence will be felt. She speaks to Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Files Confidentially for IPO in Race With OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 秘密提交 IPO 申请，与 OpenAI 竞争
summary: Anthropic PBC has confidentially submitted draft paperwork for a public listing, potentially leapfrogging longtime rival OpenAI in the race toward a Wall Street debut as soon as this fall.

title: Anthropic Files Confidentially for IPO in Race With OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 秘密提交 IPO 申请，与 OpenAI 竞争
summary:
Anthropic has confidentially submitted draft paperwork for a public listing, potentially leapfrogging longtime rival OpenAI in the race toward a Wall Street debut as soon as this fall. Edward Ludlow reports.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Readies Feature to Split Bills by Taking Photo of a Receipt
title_cn: 苹果准备通过拍摄收据照片来分割账单
summary: Apple Inc. is planning a new service for the iPhone that will let users split bills for group dinners or other events, expanding its push into everyday financial tools and challenging third-party apps.

title: How SpaceX's IPO Is Reshaping Wall Street
title_cn: SpaceX 的 IPO 如何重塑华尔街
summary: Elon Musk is pitching investors on a company that combines rockets and AI, with a claimed market opportunity of $28.5 trillion - a scale challenging long-held assumptions about how companies are valued, and who ultimately drives stock market demand. Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Luma AI Launches Physical AI Lab
title_cn: Luma AI 推出物理人工智能实验室
summary: The next AI race is in the physical world, according to Nvidia's Jensen Huang, and Luma AI listened. The company is announcing the launch of an open research lab that will allow anyone to train robots on its software. Luma AI CEO Amit Jain joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYC Tech Week Showcases New York's Tech Playbook
title_cn: 纽约科技周展示纽约科技手册
summary: New York Tech Week kicks off with a record 1,500 events, gathering thousands of founders, venture capitalists, and innovators across the city. Julie Samuels, president and CEO of Tech:NYC, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the city's rising status as a global tech hub. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Humanoid Hands Are AI’s Real Test
title_cn: 人形手是人工智能的真正考验
summary: Humanoid robots are improving fast, but usefulness remains the biggest hurdle, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Catherine Thorbecke. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Gets Into the PC Market With New Chip | Bloomberg Tech 6/1/2026
title_cn: Nvidia 凭借新芯片进军 PC 市场彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 1 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Nvidia's next target: the PC. A new AI chip sends Nvidia and related stocks soaring while rivals slide after Jensen Huang's Computex keynote. Plus, all eyes on SpaceX as the upcoming mega IPO is already reshaping Wall Street. And, what to expect from New York Tech Week, kicking off today. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: True Crime Podcaster Audiochuck Replaces CEO With SoulCycle Head
title_cn: 《真实犯罪》播客 Audiochuck 用 SoulCycle 负责人取代首席执行官
summary: Evelyn Webster has been named the new chief executive officer of the company behind Crime Junkie

title: 2026 IPO Boom: Spacex, OpenAI and Anthropic
title_cn: 2026 年 IPO 热潮：Spacex、OpenAI 和 Anthropic
summary: Anthropic PBC has confidentially submitted draft paperwork for a public listing as it races longtime rival OpenAI to make a Wall Street debut as soon as this fall. Anthony Hughes and James Seyffart have more  on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Confidentially Files for IPO in Race Against Rival OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 秘密申请 IPO，与竞争对手 OpenAI 竞争
summary: Anthropic PBC has confidentially filed draft paperwork to go public as it races rival OpenAI to make a Wall Street debut as soon as this fall. The number of shares to be offered and the price have not been set yet. Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Defends Settlement With Musk After Judge Cites ‘Red Flags’
title_cn: 法官引用“危险信号”后，美国证券交易委员会捍卫与马斯克的和解
summary: A proposed settlement between Elon Musk and the Securities and Exchange Commission to end the agency’s Twitter Inc. stake lawsuit came after almost a year of negotiations, attorneys for the agency said Monday after a judge raised concerns about the deal.

title: China Rips New York Times on Taiwan After Reporter Expelled
title_cn: 记者被驱逐后，中国在台湾问题上猛烈抨击《纽约时报》
summary: China condemned the New York Times for its reporting on Taiwan, escalating a dispute that led to the expulsion of a journalist from the world’s second-biggest economy.

title: Trump Plan to Pause Anti-Weaponization Fund Faces GOP Skepticism
title_cn: 特朗普暂停反武器化基金的计划遭到共和党怀疑
summary: The Trump administration’s plans to scrap, for now, a controversial $1.8 billion legal fund for victims of alleged government “weaponization” ran into skepticism from Republican senators who demanded public assurances the fund is dead.

title: New Zealand Prime Minister Vows to Keep Nuclear-Free Stance
title_cn: 新西兰总理誓言保持无核立场
summary: Prime Minister Christopher Luxon said New Zealand will maintain its nuclear-free stance, distancing himself from comments by the nation’s defense minister that a conversation about the decades-old policy would be helpful.

title: Rep. Goodlander: Congress Must Check Trump on Iran
title_cn: 众议员古德兰德：国会必须在伊朗问题上制衡特朗普
summary: Democratic Congresswoman Maggie Goodlander of New Hampshire, a member of the House Armed Services Committee, criticizes President Trump's handling of the conflict with Iran, arguing Congress must use its war-powers and spending authority to demand clearer answers from the Pentagon. She also calls for legislation to explicitly prohibit the $1.8 billion so-called "weaponization" fund, saying the DOJ's court-ordered pause does not go far enough. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Flood: Congress Should 'Get On With Reconciliation'
title_cn: 众议员弗拉德：国会应该“继续和解”
summary: Republican Congressman Mike Flood of Nebraska, chair of the Republican Main Street Caucus and a member of the House Financial Services Committee, stresses the need for Congress to move on reconciliation after the Justice Department made what he calls the "right choice" on the $1.8 billion so-called "weaponization" fund. He says a House vote on reconciliation could come as soon as Friday if the package clears the Senate, predicts a War Powers resolution on Iran will fail and calls for extending FISA authority. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Aims to Calm Lebanon Tensions to Keep Peace Talks Alive
title_cn: 特朗普旨在平息黎巴嫩紧张局势以保持和平谈判的活力
summary: President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.

title: Iran Strategy Must Run Through Diplomacy: Hicks
title_cn: 希克斯：伊朗战略必须通过外交
summary: Kathleen Hicks, former US Deputy Secretary of Defense in the Biden administration and senior fellow at Harvard Kennedy School's Belfer Center, says the path out of the Iran conflict requires experienced negotiators and professional diplomatic teams. She also weighs in on the future of autonomous-weapons spending at the Pentagon. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Royalton Ceases Work in Cuba as Sanctions Loom Over Hotel Sector
title_cn: 由于制裁笼罩酒店业，美仑大酒店停止在古巴的工作
summary: The Cuban subsidiary of Royalton Hotels & Resorts Ltd. shut down its operations on the island after the US imposed a de facto fuel blockade on the communist government and expanded sanctions to target foreign companies.

title: Markets Move as Traders Weigh Trump Posts on Iran, Israel | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/1/2026
title_cn: 交易员权衡特朗普关于伊朗和以色列的言论，市场走势彭博商业周刊日报 6/1/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg economics and government reporter Galit Altstein, breaks down Israel's role the US-Iran conflict as ceasefire negotiations grind to a halt after Israel's attacks on Lebanon. Then, David Bianco, Americas CIO at DWS on impact of war and the AI trade on the equity market. Plus, Bloomberg semiconductors reporter Ian King discusses Nvidia's foray into the PC market with the announcement of a chip from the tech giant. Finally, Andrew Grove, chairman of Copper Intelligences, talks the copper market and how demand is outpacing supply as the US rapidly builds out data centers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Consumer Watchdog Lets Big Business Out of Millions Owed
title_cn: 特朗普的消费者监管机构让大企业摆脱了数百万美元的债务
summary: Under Trump, Russell Vought has gutted a consumer watchdog, and in dozens of cases refused to enforce settlements and pursue lawsuits in favor of big businesses like Walmart, Toyota and others.

title: EU Poised to Give Countries Budget Leeway to Cushion Energy Cost
title_cn: 欧盟准备给予各国预算余地以缓冲能源成本
summary: The European Commission is weighing plans to grant member states additional fiscal flexibility to cope with the impact of high energy costs due to the Iran War, according to people familiar with the discussions.

title: Albania’s Rama Backs Kushner Resort as Land Ownership Probed
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚拉玛支持库什纳度假村，因为土地所有权受到调查
summary: Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama defended plans for a €4 billion ($4.7 billion) luxury resort promoted by Jared Kushner on Monday as protests erupted over preliminary works on site and prosecutors probe land ownership.

title: Democrats See a Midterm Opening on Economic Concerns
title_cn: 民主党人认为中期选举将开启经济担忧
summary: Iowa’s primary gives Democrats a chance to experiment with messages that could play well with the working class.

title: Chile President Lays Out Security Agenda and Vandal Black List
title_cn: 智利总统制定安全议程和破坏者黑名单
summary: Chile President José Antonio Kast said in his first State of the Nation address that he’ll roll out new public security measures in coming weeks, including one to create a black list of “vandals” who would lose the right to some social benefits.

title: US Stocks Reach Record as Trump Keeps Peace Deal Hopes Intact
title_cn: 特朗普保持和平协议希望不变，美国股市创历史新高
summary: US stocks climbed to a new all-time high on Monday after President Donald Trump said Israel’s attacks on Lebanon would stop and that talks with Iran were continuing.

title: Tech-Led Rally Drives Historic Market Gains Amid Geopolitical Risks
title_cn: 在地缘政治风险中，科技引领的涨势推动市场历史性上涨
summary: Julia Hermann, Global Market Strategist at New York Life Investment Management, discusses the ongoing historic market rally, potentially marking a tenth consecutive week of gains not seen in about 40 years. This rally is primarily driven by the AI trade, with US technology stocks providing significant support to financial conditions and investor sentiment despite mounting geopolitical risks. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danish Leader Wins Third Term After Record-Long Coalition Talks
title_cn: 丹麦领导人在创纪录的联盟谈判后赢得第三个任期
summary: Denmark’s Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen will remain in power for a third term to oversee fractured relations with the US after a breakthrough in record-long talks to form a coalition.

title: Trump Says Iran Talks Still On | Balance of Power: Early Edition 6/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗谈判仍在继续权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 6 月 1 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Middle East. On today's show, Georgia Tech Professor Adam Stulberg, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Bluestack Strategies Founder Maura Gillespie and Decision Tree Research Founder and CEO Gregory Allen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The US Has About An 18 Month AI Lead On China Says Allen
title_cn: 艾伦称美国在人工智能领域领先中国约 18 个月
summary: Gregory Allen, Founder and CEO of Decision Tree Research joined Balance of Power to discuss the competition between the US and China on the AI race. He also discussed the news that Anthropic has confidentially filed for IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Reviews SEC, CFTC Bid to Revisit Swaps Reporting
title_cn: 白宫审查 SEC 和 CFTC 重新审视掉期报告的提议
summary: The White House is reviewing an early-stage move from the Securities and Exchange Commission and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to revisit reporting requirements for both swaps and security-based swaps, as the two market regulators continue their effort to better coordinate.

title: Iran Is Trying To 'Buy For Time' Against The US Says Stulberg
title_cn: 斯图尔伯格表示，伊朗正试图为对抗美国“争取时间”
summary: Adam Stulberg, Sam Nunn School of International Affairs Chair at Georgia Tech, joined Bloomberg's Balance of Power to discuss the ongoing war in the Middle East. He said oil prices could remain high through the first quarter of 2027 even with a diplomatic deal between the US and Iran today. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mandelson Files Lay Bare Rifts Shaping Battle to Replace Starmer
title_cn: 曼德尔森文件揭露了塑造斯塔默取代之战的裂痕
summary: Shortly before Peter Mandelson was named the UK’s ambassador to the US, he assured the government it was making the right decision.

title: Border Patrol Chief Tapped as Immigration Crackdown Continues
title_cn: 移民镇压继续，边境巡逻队长被任命
summary: US Customs and Border Protection named Rosario “Pete” Vasquez as chief of the US Border Patrol on Monday, as the Trump administration seeks to sustain a sharp decline in illegal border crossings.

title: Cepeda Walks Back Claim of Colombian Vote Count Irregularities
title_cn: 塞佩达收回对哥伦比亚计票违规行为的指控
summary: Colombia’s leftist presidential candidate Iván Cepeda said Monday that he hadn’t seen any evidence of major irregularities in Sunday’s vote, in which he finished second to right-wing outsider Abelardo de la Espriella.

title: Merz Will Gather Leaders to Forge NATO for Wooing Trump
title_cn: 梅尔茨将召集领导人组建北约以拉拢特朗普
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz plans to host European leaders later this month with a goal of crafting a plan to smooth relations with President Donald Trump at a NATO summit in July, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Iran to Suspend Talks With US Over Israel's Expanded Offensive in Lebanon
title_cn: 伊朗将暂停与美国就以色列扩大黎巴嫩攻势进行谈判
summary: Iran said it would halt talks with the US in protest over Israel’s expanded ground assault in Lebanon, escalating tensions as Washington and Tehran try to iron out a tentative peace deal. Tyler Kendall reports on the latest out of the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM Shares Surge as Old Clip of Trump’s Praise Recirculates
title_cn: 特朗普赞扬的旧片段再次流传，IBM 股价飙升
summary: A nearly six-month old video of Donald Trump praising International Business Machines Corp.’s CEO sent the shares surging as much as 10% on Monday to a record high, adding more than $28 billion to the company’s stock-market value.
